name: LionOre Australia
description: LionOre Australia (Nickel) Limited was an Australian-based mining company primarily focused on nickel production. The company operated as a subsidiary of the international mining group LionOre Mining International, which was eventually acquired by Norilsk Nickel in 2007 for US$6.3 billion. LionOre Australia was listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker LON before being delisted following a compulsory acquisition of its shares. The company played a significant role in the Australian nickel sector during its period of operation, contributing to the broader portfolio of its parent organization's global mining assets.
